title: Kollam Beach
tagline: Kollam Beach — beach town of Kerala

overview.short: Kollam Beach, also known as Mahatma Gandhi Beach, is a beach at Kollam city in the Indian state of Kerala.
overview.description: Kollam Beach, also known as Mahatma Gandhi Beach, is a beach at Kollam city in the Indian state of Kerala. Kollam Beach is the first 'Beach Wedding Destination' in Kerala. The beach also features a park of international standard, the Mahatma Gandhi Park, which was inaugurated on 1 January 1961 by the then Vice President of India, Zakir Husain. Kollam beach is one among the few beaches in Kerala with a lifeguard outpost.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mahatma Gandhi Park
topPlaces.description: Mahatma Gandhi Park (also known as MG park) is a public park situated near Kollam Beach in the city of Kollam, Kerala, India. It is about 2 km away from Chinnakada - The city centre of 'Cashew Capital of the World'.

topPlaces.name: Kollam Kite Club
topPlaces.description: Kollam Kite Club or Kite Club, Kollam is a registered kite flying club situated at Kollam city in India. The club is mainly focused on kite flying, kite workshops etc.

topPlaces.name: Kollam Port
topPlaces.description: Kollam Port or Port of Quilon is one of the oldest ports (established in AD 825) situated 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) away from Downtown Kollam (formerly Quilon) It is the third largest port in Kerala by volume of cargo handled and facilities and one of the four Kerala ports having immigration checkpoint (ICP) facility. Located on the south-west coast of India, it was an important port from the ninth to the seventeenth centuries.

topPlaces.name: Cashew Export Promotion Council of India
topPlaces.description: The Cashew Export Promotion Council of India or CEPC or CEPCI was established by the Government of India in 1955, with the active cooperation of the cashew industry with the object of promoting exports of cashew kernels and cashew nut shell liquid from India. It is headquartered in Mundakkal in the city of Kollam, Kerala.

image.alt: Cashew Export Promotion Council of India

topPlaces.name: Andamukkam City bus stand
topPlaces.description: Andamukkam City bus stand, Kollam, is one of the two bus stands in the city of Kollam in the Indian state of Kerala. Situated in the Downtown Kollam area, it is also known as Andamukkam private bus stand.

topPlaces.name: Thamarakulam
topPlaces.description: Thamarakulam or Thamarakkulam is a business centre and neighbourhood of Kollam city in Kerala, India. Thamarakulam is a part of Downtown Kollam area and is near Chinnakada.

topPlaces.name: Andamukkam
topPlaces.description: Andamukkam or Aandamukkam is a neighbourhood of Kollam city in Kerala, India. It is a part of Downtown Kollam.

topPlaces.name: Mundakkal
topPlaces.description: Mundakkal, also spelt Mundackal, is an important residential area and industrial hub situated in the city of Kollam, Kerala, India. The place is considered as the capital of India's cashew processing activities.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kollam Beach?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kollam Beach is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kollam Beach?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (59 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kollam Beach?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kollam Beach at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kollam Beach?
faq.a: Stays in Kollam Beach start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kollam Beach?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mahatma Gandhi Park, Kollam Kite Club, Kollam Port, Cashew Export Promotion Council of India, Andamukkam City bus stand.
